message:
feat(tui): add MailEvent typed event model, ring buffer, and TuiSharedState bridge

Implement the foundational TUI data layer for the interactive console:

tui_events.rs (br-10wc.15): 11-variant MailEvent enum (#[non_exhaustive])
covering tool calls, messages, reservations, HTTP, lifecycle events.
EventRingBuffer with configurable capacity (default 10,000), monotonic
sequence assignment, try_push for non-blocking server-side writes,
replay/filter/since-seq queries, and drop accounting via EventRingStats.
24 unit tests with serde roundtrips for all variants.

tui_bridge.rs (br-10wc.16): TuiSharedState Arc-wrapped bridge between
MCP server and TUI renderer with atomic HTTP request counters,
EventRingBuffer integration, ConfigSnapshot (sanitized DB URLs),
bounded sparkline buffer (capacity 60), shutdown signal, periodic DB
stats. 12 unit tests covering concurrency and Send+Sync assertions.

Wire up pub mod tui_bridge in lib.rs. Also apply unwrap_or_else for
lazy evaluation in readiness_check max_overflow computation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
